refnamediv.refpurpose: change an equation in a model

listitem.para: - a string vector, the names of the equations to replace
- or a vector of integers, the indexes of the equations to replace
* neweq = a string vector, the text of the new equations
* model2 = the new model, with the new equations

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Changes equations in a model.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
